name: Happen, Inc.
business: LendingClub operates a leading nationally chartered digital bank focused on serving a large and underserved segment of creditworthy U.S. consumers that we refer to as the motivated middle. Its primary consumer loan products include personal loans, major purchase finance, and auto refinance. The deposit business includes high-yield savings, checking, and certificates of deposit.
sellsTo: marketplace investors (asset managers, financial institutions, insurance companies)

exposures.sentence: LendingClub operates a leading nationally chartered digital bank focused on serving a large and underserved segment of creditworthy U.S. consumers that we refer to as the motivated middle.

catalysts.event: Expand loan offerings to include home improvement financing
catalysts.sentence: By leveraging our existing purchase finance capabilities, we intend to expand our loan offerings in 2026 to include home improvement financing, enabling payments directly to partner retail merchants and contractors and streamlining the customer financing experience.
